title: GeoPulse 1.35.0
highlights: Added admin timeline regeneration campaigns with affected-user preview, progress tracking, failed-user retry, audit logging, and user notifications
Added a raw GPS points layer on the timeline map with point grouping, detailed popups, and location lookup for individual points
Added a dedicated notifications page with filtering, pagination, mark-as-seen actions, and clearer links back to the related GeoPulse area
Improved Friends Live so all friend locations can be shown together, with better map bounds and controls for resetting filtered views
Added unsaved changes protection for Profile and Timeline Preferences pages
Improved date and mobile form handling by allowing manual timeline date entry and preventing unwanted mobile browser zoom on inputs and date pickers
Bundled country flags locally for Journey Insights so flags work without external image fetches
Added REST API documentation and refreshed the documentation site landing page, search, dark theme, and new feature docs
Improved Visit Places table on the Place page to be more informative
Fixed some bugs in geocoding normalization when executed manually
Added immich thubmnail for a single photo on the map
